whySection.title: Building the future of beauty appointments

items.title: A new standard
items.desc: Booking beauty and wellness services becomes instant — like ordering a ride or a delivery.

items.title: An ecosystem, not just bookings
items.desc: Glamro connects professionals, clients and services in one digital experience.

items.title: Your salon, always with you
items.desc: At home, at the hotel, at the office. Beauty is no longer tied to a place.

items.title: Certified professionals
items.desc: Digital payments, quality, safety, traceability and trust at the center.

vision.title: Glamro will revolutionize the way you take care of yourself.
vision.body: No more waits, calls or stress. Discover and book the best beauty and wellness services straight to your door, in seconds. Almost every industry has gone digital. Beauty has been still too long. Glamro is here to change the rules of the game.

items.desc: App available on App Store and Google Play across Italy.

items.desc: Merchandising, professional beauty products and platform optimization.

finalCta.title: Your beauty, finally, just one tap away.

features.desc: Leave promotion to us. You focus on what you love.

pros.ctaSubtitle: Sign up in the Glamro app and complete your professional profile in minutes.

about.title: We're rewriting the rules of beauty.
about.lead: Glamro was born from the idea that beauty should not be an appointment, but an experience. A fluid, immediate, accessible experience.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: To bring the beauty & wellness world into the future, building the digital infrastructure that connects millions of clients with the best professionals in Italy.

items.title: Simplicity
items.desc: An experience designed to be immediate, in every detail.

items.title: Trust
items.desc: Safe payments, real reviews, human support.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Technology serving people, never the opposite.

items.a: Glamro is the first Italian beauty delivery app: it connects clients and beauty & wellness professionals for at-home or in-salon services, in just a few taps.

items.q: When will the app be available?
items.a: The private beta starts April 1, 2026, while the official launch on App Store and Google Play is scheduled for May 1, 2026.

items.q: In which cities will it be available?
items.a: We'll start from the main Italian cities and progressively expand across the entire country.
Haircuts and beard, manicure and pedicure, face and body treatments, make-up, hairstyling, massages and much more.
Each professional is manually verified by our team: documents, certifications and portfolio. Only the best join Glamro.

items.q: I'm a professional, how can I join?
items.a: Download the app as soon as it's available and complete the professional registration. In the meantime, contact us for early information.
All payments happen in-app, securely and tracked. No cash, no worries.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Have a question, an idea or want to collaborate with us? Write to us, we'll reply within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Beauty delivery, just one tap away.
